text:
Note: this same problem happened with OO-2.0.3

1) Create new database (register, define fields)
2) OPEN new database (for data entry)
3) Insert/enter one (or more) row(s) of data
4) Save data
5) Verify saved data in temporary files on /var/tmp
6) Verify data save via KTRACE
7) CLOSE database editing window
8) "crash and burn"
9) verified via KTRACE that OObase read the saved data prior to crash
